negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_055
prompt: A close-up shot captures a person's hands skillfully chopping dried green herbs on a richly textured wooden cutting board. The knife, held firmly, moves rhythmically back and forth, slicing through the herbs with precision. The herbs, initially whole and scattered, are progressively chopped finer, accumulating on the board. The camera angle shifts slightly to show the herbs being methodically cut, emphasizing the rhythmic motion of the knife. The background remains consistent, focusing solely on the chopping action, with the cutting board's grain patterns adding depth to the scene. The video concludes with a pile of finely chopped green pieces on the board, showcasing the meticulous process of herb preparation.
